primary_sources: Each issuer's transfer page when bonuses run
_meta.notes: Active credit-card transfer bonuses. These run for ~2-4 weeks each. They effectively raise the floor cpp on the source currency by the bonus percentage. ALWAYS check whether transferring NOW (during a bonus) gives more value than holding (pending a bigger future bonus on the same partner).

recent_history.notes: Recurring ~quarterly. Virgin transfers from Amex are one of the program's best uses (ANA First Class for example).
Avios + BA partner sweet spots (short-haul AA flights, JAL business class, etc.).
Aeroplan partner award sweet spots — esp. Star Alliance flights.
LifeMiles is a major Star Alliance award currency. Watch for recurring bonuses.

tracking_notes: Refresh weekly when active bonuses are running
When no active bonuses, recent_history is the best signal of what's coming next (programs run bonuses on cycles)
Don't transfer points speculatively — transfer only when you have a redemption identified
